problem id: ad1ade98
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHR(7)

examples:
  01110001 -> 00000000
  00101010 -> 00000000
  10100100 -> 00000001
  01000111 -> 00000000
  11000110 -> 00000000
  01110011 -> 00000000
  00010111 -> 00000000
  10001111 -> 00000000

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 00000000
